meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Project Management for SaaS: The Freelancer's Guide
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with SaaS architecture. Use this intermediate checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to manage projects like a pro and scale fast.
content.answer_block: Bridging the gap between design and scalable SaaS requires rigorous project management. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can transform abstract requirements into production-ready code. This workflow ensures high-velocity delivery, client satisfaction, and a repeatable engine for your freelance business.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank terminal, the client’s deadline looming, and the weight of 'not knowing SaaS' is paralyzing. You have the vision, but the technical architecture feels like a labyrinth designed to keep you from shipping. Most freelancers burn out here, trapped in endless configuration loops and scope creep.

But the industry elite don't build from scratch—they orchestrate. By treating your code like a product and your workflow like a pipeline, you stop being a frantic coder and start being a SaaS architect. This guide replaces guesswork with a high-octane stack using Antigravity and Claude Code, designed to get you from 'no idea' to 'production-ready' in record time.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Core
steps.description: Before writing code, define your data schema and business logic to prevent technical debt. Use Antigravity to structure the project foundation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a high-level SaaS architecture schema including User, Subscription, and Project entities. Define relationships for a multi-tenant environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project README and initial folder structure based on the schema provided by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Scaffolding
steps.description: Eliminate repetitive setup tasks. Use Antigravity to generate clean, typed boilerplate that adheres to industry standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean Next.js 14 project structure with Tailwind CSS, Drizzle ORM, and Auth.js integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the repository and install all dependencies defined in the generated package.json.'

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Break down the feature list into manageable sprints. Use Claude Code to translate user stories into functional modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a detailed implementation plan for a secure user onboarding flow including Stripe checkout integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the user onboarding flow based on the provided implementation plan. Ensure all edge cases are covered.'

steps.title: Automated Testing & Validation
steps.description: Ensure your code is production-ready. Generate tests for critical paths to avoid regressions during client review.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for the core authentication and payment processing logic using Vitest.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Run all unit tests and provide a report on coverage. Fix any failing tests immediately.'

steps.title: Client-Ready Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Streamline the delivery process. Set up an automated pipeline that deploys to a staging environment for client validation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated deployment to Vercel upon merging to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure the deployment environment variables and verify the CI/CD pipeline integrity.'

pro_tips: Always use a 'Context File' that Claude Code can read to maintain consistency across large codebases.
Map your database schema in Antigravity before touching any UI components to ensure data integrity.
Force Claude Code to explain its architectural decisions in a comment block at the top of every new file.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation as you build, so you have a handover manual for your client automatically.
Implement a 'Debug Log' function early so Claude Code can automatically diagnose issues in production logs.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, audit your workflow to identify which components can be turned into reusable templates for your next client.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical ambiguity stall your growth. Leverage the power of AI-driven architecture to deliver enterprise-grade SaaS faster than your competition. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
